name: As On the Board, So On the Battlefield

description.value:
You're a master of strategy games, able to translate strategies and mechanics from these games to the actual battles they were created to simulate. You can use your proficiency rank in Games Lore for anything that requires proficiency in Warfare Lore (such as prerequisites) and use your Games Lore modifier in place of your Warfare Lore modifier for checks. You can use Games Lore to [[/act make-an-impression]] on military professionals, such as mercenaries and commanders. Your reputation as a strategist opens up opportunities while you're in a military camp, near a battlefield, or somewhere else that has numerous non-hostile soldiers, allowing you to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Earn Income] with Games Lore with a task level of at least your level –1.

If you lead a troop and have had time to create a skirmish bond with them, you've also spent time going over the finer points of strategy and even played against many members of your troop. Once per day, you can roll Games Lore for initiative when leading this troop.
